info.name: Microsoft Azure DeploymentStacksClient
info.description: The APIs listed in this specification can be used to manage deployment stack resources through the Azure Resource Manager.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Deploymentstacks Deploymentstackname Exporttemplate

request.description: Exports the template used to create the deployment stack.

response.name: OK - Returns the Template or TemplateLink payload of the deployment stack.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Deploymentstacks Deploymentstackname

request.description: Creates or updates a Deployment Stack.

response.name: OK - The Deployment Stack update request has succeeded.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Deployment Stack created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Deploymentstacks Deploymentstackname

request.description: Gets a Deployment Stack with a given name.

response.name: OK - Returns information about the Deployment Stack.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Resources Deploymentstacks Deploymentstackname

query.description: Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resources.
Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resource groups.

request.description: Deletes a Deployment Stack by name. When operation completes, status code 200 returned without content.

response.name: OK - Deployment Stack deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resources.
Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resource groups.

response.name: Accepted - Check location header for deletion status.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resources.
Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resource groups.

response.name: Deployment Stack does not exist.

query.description: Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resources.
Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resource groups.

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resources.
Flag to indicate delete rather than detach for the resource groups.
